//: Typecheck config for the Pixi v7 adapter. Same DOM lib as tsconfig.pixi.json, but the `paths` override redirects the bare `pixi.js` import to the npm-alias devDep (`pixi7` = pixi.js@7.4.3) so src/pixi7 typechecks against v7 types while tsc still EMITS `import ... from "pixi.js"` unchanged (paths affect type resolution only). The `paths` list is a DUAL-CONTEXT fallback: in the monorepo npm hoists the alias to the WORKSPACE ROOT node_modules (../../node_modules/pixi7), while in the subtree-split standalone mirror (github.com/brac/particlr-runtime) this package IS the repo root and npm installs it locally (./node_modules/pixi7). TS tries the entries in order and the first that resolves to a real file wins, so one array serves both layouts (was ../../ only, which fell through silently to v8 in the mirror and broke its CI). skipLibCheck is inherited from base and restated here for the documented @webgpu/types vs lib.dom drift.
